ksa_text: Skill in conducting data profiling to identify patterns, anomalies, and characteristics within data, including analysis of data structures and content assessment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Data Quality is an edge domain for the Chief Data Scientist, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.47) and conceptual alignment to include at the c suite level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Quality), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.47). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Chief Data Scientist versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK Data Quality Management chapter and industry surveys confirm data quality competencies for quality-focused leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Data Quality appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Chief Data Scientist.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.47. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Chief Data Scientist.
